title: Sunlit Resourcepack
description: Sunlit is a visually enhanced Minecraft resource pack that brings a warm, bright, and golden atmosphere to your world, creating a radiant and inviting daytime experience.
body:
## ☀️ Sunlit Resourcepack ☀️

Bring a warm, vibrant look to your Minecraft world with Sunlit. This resource pack enhances the game with a clean golden UI, improved item visuals, and subtle visual upgrades that make everything feel brighter and more polished while staying true to vanilla.
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
☀️ Features

- Golden themed UI & menus
- Cleaner inventory and hotbar
- Updated icons and interface elements
- Improved items and blocks
- Visual tweaks like glowing weapons
- Polished Elytra and equipment
- Enhanced environment details

Sunlit keeps the familiar Minecraft style while giving it a fresh, bright and modern feel.

You can add your ideas here ! >>> https://sunlit-resourcepack.base44.app/Tasks <<<

Youtube Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Sst8i1GmMks
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
**Credits** 
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
This project previously included certain assets originally created by Vanilla Tweaks.
In accordance with their Terms of Use, here is the required attribution:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ (Please tell me if you found stuff from vanillatweaks i want to remove it!)

Check out https://packxbr.f53.dev/ I used it to upscale my pack and it does amazing work !
_____________________________________________________________________________________________
